---
title: "R Workshop"
author: "Meghin Mather"
date: 2026-03-18
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

```{r}
3
4
typeof(8.5)
```

```{r}
"this is a text string"
```


```{r}
typeof("strings")
```
```{r}
a <- c(1, 2, 3)
a

c(1, 2, 3)
c("a", "b", "c")
c(TRUE, FALSE)
c(1, "two", 3)
```
```{r}
#| label: setup
source("training_source.R")
```
```{r}
csv_path <- "../data/raw/presurvey_20260317.csv"
survey_raw <- rio::import(csv_path)
```
